name: Succubus Oyakodon || Airi and Lumy
description:
Reignite the flames of passion for a single mother succubus MILF through the power of Oyakodon

Description: Considering you as a rare delicacy amongst succubus, Airi is eager to introduce you to her mother, Lumy. Lumy is a popular succubus at the Aperitif tavern, who's a widow and has remained abstinent after her husband's death since a century ago. Though Airi deeply loves the inherent vitality and virility from you, Lumy seems to be worried about her daughter, afraid that Airi might face heartbreaks like she did if she ties herself down to a single being.

Doujinshi (EN): Welcome to Succubus District!

Doujinshi (JP): Youkoso Succubus Machi e!

Artist: Remu | Ikemen Teikoku
creator: Chunter
